characters.name: Tyler "Ty" Townsend
characters.description: Career-Ending Injury: Suffers one at the start of the second season when he gets into a fight with Jackson at the hospital after Kyle and Nellie’s accident. So Proud of You: Gets this surprising reaction from Bill in the second season finale when he announces that he quit baseball since he realized that he only played it to please Bill and not because he enjoyed the game.

characters.name: Kyle Townsend
characters.description: Big Damn Kiss: Between him and Nellie in the second season finale. It’s bittersweet since she is forbidden to see him. Black Sheep: Has an interest in drama and not athletics, unlike his older brother and father. Middle Child Syndrome: Feels forgotten in his family, given that all his parents' attention is on Ty's athletic accomplishments and taking care of Katie,The Baby of the Bunch.

characters.name: Bill Townsend
characters.description: Disappeared Dad: In the second season, he announces to Maddie and the kids that he is leaving Serenity and moving to an apartment in Castlewood.

characters.name: Annie Sullivan
characters.description: Adapted Out: In the novels, Annie has a life-threatening eating disorder, which forces Dana Sue to bring Ronnie back to Serenity. In the series, Annie doesn't have an eating disorder and Dana Sue seeks out Ronnie for financial reasons related to her restaurant. Kissing Under the Influence: An intoxicated Annie kisses Ty when he takes her home after she drinks too much at a party. He brushes off the kiss because she was drunk.

characters.name: Isaac Downey
characters.description: Luke, I Am Your Father: It's revealed in the second season that Isaac's birth father isBill, who didn't know he got Peggy Martin pregnant in high school.
